projectDescription: A calm desktop Markdown reader for macOS, Windows, and Linux — open a file and read it, with clean rendering, tabs, navigation history, and a document minimap.
keyFeatures: CommonMark + GFM rendering (tables, task lists, strikethrough, autolinks)
GitHub extras: syntax highlighting, Mermaid diagrams, math, alert callouts, footnotes, emoji
Local image protocol (leaf-image://) for secure relative image resolution
Safe raw HTML via ammonia allowlist — scripts and dangerous URLs stripped
Document minimap with viewport indicator and click-to-jump
Back/Forward navigation history across documents and scroll positions
System theme (light/dark/Dracula) with compiler-backed semantic token contract
Library pane with Project/Tree/Flat views and SQLite indexer
Live reload on file change via filesystem watcher
publicApiSurface: Keyboard shortcut: Ctrl+O / Cmd+O — open file
Keyboard shortcut: Ctrl+W / Cmd+W — close tab
Keyboard shortcut: Alt+← / Cmd+← — navigate back
Keyboard shortcut: Alt+→ / Cmd+→ — navigate forward
IpcCommand enum (main.rs) — WebView ↔ host message bus
UserEvent enum (main.rs) — custom tao event loop events
app_shell_html() (lib.rs) — generates full HTML/CSS/JS application shell
Indexer (indexer.rs) — background SQLite crawler with FileTreeNode output
just release <version> — cut a versioned release
